privileged_info_summary: The task verifies landscape layout handling of the Flight Crew View Android app (com.robert.fcView). All metadata claims are verified: the proof screenshot should be saved to /sdcard/landscape_proof.png with landscape dimensions (width > height), and a rotation report should be created at /sdcard/rotation_report.txt containing the text 'rotated: yes' to indicate successful layout adaptation. The app is a real airline crew scheduling application, not synthetic data. The verification checks that the app remains stable (non-crashed) in landscape mode, that the screenshot has valid landscape dimensions, and that the device is restored to portrait mode after testing.
